action.reasoning: Observation: ViT-B/16 AugReg pilot now trains successfully and reaches strong source-val accuracy (~0.713 flip) after 2 epochs, comparable to DINOv2 source-val and above the ResNet best, but prior experiments showed source-val can be misleading for Quickdraw. Analysis: the only reliable way to judge this backbone is direct evaluation, and the pilot checkpoint is already available. With ~5.3 hours and 16 iterations left, the highest-value next step is to submit this ViT pilot immediately before considering any longer run. Decision: submit eval on checkpoints/vit_pilot/best.pt using the current predict.py; no further code changes this iteration.
